title: Fix MISSING node normalization in diff tests
description:
PARTIALLY RESOLVED. The MISSING node serialization false positive is fixed (Go's String() includes MISSING nodes inline, C CLI excludes them; fixed by stripping MISSING nodes in NormalizeCLIOutput). networking.c now passes.

Remaining C/C++ divergences (server.c, server.h, curl.h, transfer.c, url.c, descriptor.cc, descriptor.h, message.cc) are caused by the main loop structure difference — see ql0.5.
